name: Tessaly Orin
rank: Archivist Second Class (junior to Eir Velan, senior to Dova)
sd_appearance: In the dimly lit labyrinth of the Undercity, amidst the ash-white robes of the Guild of Ashen Scrolls, a slender, graceful figure with pointed ears stands, hunched over a desk adorned with multiple sealed scroll cases and fate-reading tools. Her skin is a warm, earthy tone, contrasting sharply with her stark white attire. Long, dark hair, forever in a state of being-just-put-up-or-just-taken-down, frames a face framed by reading lenses on a chain, and ink-stained hands, a testament to her tireless work. A staff or dagger, a last resort, is visible at her side, while multiple scroll cases and reinforced elbows, a sign of her role as an Archivist Second Class, complete her scholarly appearance. A single, distinctive visual detail stands out: a persistent aura of determination, burning in her eyes, as she meticulously records the fate of each adventurer in her quest to answer the question that has eluded many.
faction_visual: ash-white archival robes, multiple sealed scroll cases, fate-reading tools
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
